subject: Cloud Computing
title: Virtual Networking in IaaS
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Virtual Networking in IaaS.

hook.text: Your cloud servers need a network. In IaaS, you design the entire network yourself — in software.

buildup.text: A VPC — Virtual Private Cloud — is your isolated network. You define subnets, routes, and gateways.

discovery.text: Security groups act as firewalls, controlling which traffic can enter or leave each server.

twist.text: A single misconfigured security group can expose your entire database to the public internet.

climax.text: Cloud networking is powerful but unforgiving. One wrong rule and your data is wide open.

punchline.text: Virtual networks are flexible. Misconfigured ones are dangerous.

quiz.question: What is a VPC (Virtual Private Cloud)?
options: An isolated virtual network you design and control in the cloud
A private cloud that only one person can access
A VPN connection between your office and the internet
